words.note: povratni dativ si; nesvršeno priuštavati si

example.target: Trenutačno si ne mogu priuštiti novi automobil.
example.gloss: At the moment I cannot afford a new car.

words.en: to manage, to find one's way

example.target: Dobro se snalazim u novom gradu.
example.gloss: I manage well in the new city.

example.target: Brzo sam se snašla na novom radnom mjestu.
example.gloss: I quickly got the hang of the new job.

words.en: to advocate, to stand up for
words.note: zalagati se za koga ili što

example.target: Ona se zalaže za pravednije uvjete rada.
example.gloss: She advocates for fairer working conditions.

example.target: Ustrajao je u učenju hrvatskoga i na kraju uspio.
example.gloss: He persisted in learning Croatian and finally succeeded.

example.target: Moram nadoknaditi propuštene sate.
example.gloss: I have to make up the missed classes.

example.target: Teško je uskladiti posao i obitelj.
example.gloss: It is hard to reconcile work and family.

example.target: Sve je bio običan nesporazum.
example.gloss: It was all a simple misunderstanding.

example.target: Preseljenje u drugu zemlju velik je pothvat.
example.gloss: Moving to another country is a big undertaking.

example.target: Imali smo poteškoća s prijevodom ugovora.
example.gloss: We had difficulties with the translation of the contract.

example.target: Moje je uvjerenje da svatko zaslužuje priliku.
example.gloss: My conviction is that everyone deserves a chance.

example.target: Moramo uzeti u obzir sve troškove.
example.gloss: We have to take all the costs into consideration.

example.target: To je bila razborita odluka.
example.gloss: That was a sensible decision.

example.target: Trener je dosljedan u svojim zahtjevima.
example.gloss: The coach is consistent in his demands.

example.target: Napisala je opsežan izvještaj o projektu.
example.gloss: She wrote an extensive report on the project.

example.target: Njegovo je znanje gramatike još uvijek površno.
example.gloss: His knowledge of grammar is still superficial.

example.target: Odjeća mora biti primjerena prigodi.
example.gloss: The clothing has to be appropriate for the occasion.

example.target: Sudac mora biti nepristran.
example.gloss: A judge has to be impartial.

example.target: On je moj kolega i ujedno najbolji prijatelj.
example.gloss: He is my colleague and at the same time my best friend.

example.target: Stan je jeftin, štoviše, blizu je centra.
example.gloss: The flat is cheap, moreover, it is close to the centre.

example.target: Naposljetku smo se dogovorili oko cijene.
example.gloss: In the end we agreed on the price.

words.en: by the way, on the way

example.target: Usput sam kupio kruh.
example.gloss: I bought bread on the way.

example.target: Ponajprije mi je važno zdravlje.
example.gloss: Health is first and foremost important to me.

example.target: Jezik više nije prepreka mojem napretku.
example.gloss: Language is no longer an obstacle to my progress.

example.target: Ishod pregovora još je neizvjestan.
example.gloss: The outcome of the negotiations is still uncertain.

example.target: Tečaj obuhvaća i gramatiku i razgovor.
example.gloss: The course covers both grammar and conversation.

example.target: Liječnica je obavila temeljit pregled.
example.gloss: The doctor carried out a thorough examination.

example.target: Dobili smo iscrpan odgovor na sva pitanja.
example.gloss: We got an exhaustive answer to all the questions.

example.target: Na kraju teksta nalazi se kratak sažetak.
example.gloss: At the end of the text there is a short summary.

example.target: Možete li sažeti glavnu misao u jednoj rečenici?
example.gloss: Can you summarize the main idea in one sentence?

example.target: Naglasak je u ovoj riječi na prvom slogu.
example.gloss: The stress in this word is on the first syllable.

example.target: U ovim okolnostima ne možemo putovati.
example.gloss: Under these circumstances we cannot travel.

example.target: Za taj je predmet nadležan drugi ured.
example.gloss: Another office is in charge of that case.

example.target: Svi su pridonijeli uspjehu projekta.
example.gloss: Everyone contributed to the success of the project.

example.target: Njezin je doprinos bio presudan.
example.gloss: Her contribution was decisive.

example.target: Pohvala mi je bila velik poticaj.
example.gloss: The praise was a great incentive for me.

example.target: Nova aplikacija olakšava učenje riječi.
example.gloss: The new app makes learning words easier.

example.target: Kiša nam je otežala put.
example.gloss: The rain made our journey harder.

example.target: Lijek je ublažio bolove.
example.gloss: The medicine alleviated the pain.

example.target: Stanje se tijekom noći pogoršalo.
example.gloss: The condition worsened during the night.

example.target: Njegova je reakcija bila pretjerana.
example.gloss: His reaction was excessive.

example.target: Ovdje vlada umjerena klima.
example.gloss: A moderate climate prevails here.

example.target: Uštedjeli smo znatan iznos.
example.gloss: We saved a considerable amount.

example.target: Ovo je jedina iznimka od pravila.
example.gloss: This is the only exception to the rule.

example.target: Budi obziran prema susjedima.
example.gloss: Be considerate towards the neighbours.

example.target: Pomogla nam je na nesebičan način.
example.gloss: She helped us in an unselfish way.

example.target: Nemoj biti sitničav oko tako male stvari.
example.gloss: Do not be petty about such a small thing.

example.target: Djed je popustljiviji od bake.
example.gloss: Grandfather is more lenient than grandmother.

example.target: Ustrajan je učenik i uvijek dovrši zadatak.
example.gloss: He is a persistent pupil and always finishes the task.

example.target: Bila je odlučna u svojoj namjeri.
example.gloss: She was determined in her intention.

example.target: Nemoj oklijevati, prijavi se odmah.
example.gloss: Do not hesitate, apply right away.

example.target: Prodavač je bio sumnjičav prema nama.
example.gloss: The shop assistant was suspicious of us.

example.target: Kako ćeš opravdati izostanak s posla?
example.gloss: How will you justify your absence from work?

example.target: Uložili smo prigovor na račun.
example.gloss: We filed a complaint about the bill.

example.target: Imam samo jednu zamjerku na tvoj tekst.
example.gloss: I have only one criticism of your text.

example.target: Nemoj mi zamjeriti na iskrenosti.
example.gloss: Do not hold my frankness against me.

example.target: Od tečaja sam imao veliku korist.
example.gloss: I got a lot of benefit from the course.

example.target: Pušenje šteti zdravlju.
example.gloss: Smoking harms your health.

example.target: Osiguranje nam je isplatilo odštetu.
example.gloss: The insurance company paid us compensation.

example.target: Ulaganje u obrazovanje uvijek je isplativo.
example.gloss: Investing in education is always worthwhile.

words.en: to pay off, to be worth it

example.target: Isplati se pričekati sniženje.
example.gloss: It pays off to wait for the sale.

example.target: Uložili smo mnogo truda u ovaj projekt.
example.gloss: We put a lot of effort into this project.

example.target: Zadužili su se kako bi kupili stan.
example.gloss: They got into debt in order to buy a flat.

example.target: Moji su roditelji vrlo štedljivi.
example.gloss: My parents are very thrifty.

example.target: Sva njihova imovina upisana je u zemljišne knjige.
example.gloss: All their property is entered in the land registry.

example.target: Mjesečni su nam prihodi ove godine porasli.
example.gloss: Our monthly income has risen this year.

example.target: Troškovi stanovanja stalno rastu.
example.gloss: Housing costs are constantly rising.

example.target: Cijene su ovdje vrlo pristupačne.
example.gloss: The prices here are very affordable.

example.target: Jamčim ti da će sve biti u redu.
example.gloss: I guarantee you that everything will be fine.

example.target: Obvezali smo se na plaćanje u dvanaest rata.
example.gloss: We committed ourselves to payment in twelve instalments.

example.target: Molimo vas da se pridržavate pravila.
example.gloss: Please abide by the rules.

example.target: Prekršio je pravila igre.
example.gloss: He broke the rules of the game.

example.target: Novi propisi stupaju na snagu u siječnju.
example.gloss: The new regulations come into force in January.

example.target: Sobu treba platiti unaprijed.
example.gloss: The room has to be paid for in advance.

example.target: Pojedinosti ćemo vam javiti naknadno.
example.gloss: We will let you know the details later on.

example.target: Ne mogu istodobno voziti i razgovarati.
example.gloss: I cannot drive and talk simultaneously.

example.target: Redoslijed riječi u rečenici je slobodniji.
example.gloss: The word order in the sentence is freer.

example.target: Postupak prijave traje desetak minuta.
example.gloss: The application procedure takes about ten minutes.

example.target: Postupno se navikavam na novi raspored.
example.gloss: I am gradually getting used to the new schedule.

example.target: Dobar rječnik temelj je razumijevanja.
example.gloss: A good vocabulary is the foundation of understanding.

words.note: osloniti se na koga; nesvršeno oslanjati se

example.target: Uvijek se mogu osloniti na sestru.
example.gloss: I can always rely on my sister.

example.target: Povjerila mi je svoju tajnu.
example.gloss: She confided her secret to me.

example.target: Djeca su cijelo vrijeme pod nadzorom.
example.gloss: The children are under supervision the whole time.

example.target: Voditeljica nadzire rad cijelog odjela.
example.gloss: The manager supervises the work of the whole department.

example.target: Ona upravlja malom tvrtkom.
example.gloss: She manages a small company.

words.en: to carry out, to spend time

example.target: Proveli smo istraživanje među studentima.
example.gloss: We carried out a survey among students.

example.target: Ovo je njegovo najveće postignuće dosad.
example.gloss: This is his greatest achievement so far.

example.target: Cijeli nam je plan propao zbog kiše.
example.gloss: Our whole plan fell through because of the rain.

example.target: Nije mi dosadno, naprotiv, jako uživam.
example.gloss: I am not bored, on the contrary, I am enjoying it a lot.

example.target: Stan je lijep, doduše, malo je skup.
example.gloss: The flat is nice, though it is a bit expensive.

example.target: Uostalom, to nije naša odgovornost.
example.gloss: After all, that is not our responsibility.

example.target: Namjeravam iduće godine polagati ispit.
example.gloss: I intend to take the exam next year.

example.target: Nastojim svaki dan naučiti deset riječi.
example.gloss: I strive to learn ten words every day.

example.target: Teško se usredotočim kad je buka.
example.gloss: I find it hard to focus when there is noise.

example.target: Nakon posla posvećujem se obitelji.
example.gloss: After work I devote myself to my family.

example.target: Uprava će razmotriti našu zamolbu.
example.gloss: The management will consider our request.

example.target: Uvidio sam da sam pogriješio.
example.gloss: I realized that I had made a mistake.

example.target: Uzrok požara još nije poznat.
example.gloss: The cause of the fire is not yet known.

example.target: Spomenuo je tvoje ime na sastanku.
example.gloss: He mentioned your name at the meeting.

example.target: Radnici su se suprotstavili novim uvjetima.
example.gloss: The workers opposed the new conditions.

example.target: Banka nam je odobrila kredit.
example.gloss: The bank approved our loan.

example.target: Liječnik mu je zabranio slanu hranu.
example.gloss: The doctor forbade him salty food.

example.target: Na ovoj cesti vrijedi ograničenje brzine.
example.gloss: A speed limit applies on this road.

example.target: Prilagodili smo raspored novim satima.
example.gloss: We adjusted the schedule to the new hours.

example.target: Nitko nije predvidio takav rasplet.
example.gloss: Nobody foresaw such an ending.

example.target: Pročitaj upute prije uporabe.
example.gloss: Read the instructions before use.

example.target: Kupila sam priručnik za hrvatsku gramatiku.
example.gloss: I bought a handbook of Croatian grammar.

example.target: Dvorana je dostupna svim polaznicima.
example.gloss: The hall is available to all participants.

example.target: Naučio je pjesmu napamet.
example.gloss: He learned the poem by heart.

example.target: Pročitaj rečenicu naglas.
example.gloss: Read the sentence aloud.

example.target: Uočili smo grešku na računu.
example.gloss: We spotted a mistake on the bill.

example.target: Ovo neka ostane naša tajna.
example.gloss: Let this remain our secret.

example.target: Priznao je da nije bio u pravu.
example.gloss: He admitted that he had not been right.

example.target: Učiteljica mi je ispravila izgovor.
example.gloss: The teacher corrected my pronunciation.

example.target: Bio je uljudan prema svakom gostu.
example.gloss: He was polite to every guest.

example.target: Ostala sam zbunjena nakon tog odgovora.
example.gloss: I was left confused after that answer.

example.target: Nosila je upadljiv crveni šešir.
example.gloss: She wore a conspicuous red hat.

example.target: Njegov je odgovor bio dvosmislen.
example.gloss: His answer was ambiguous.

example.target: Napetost među njima bila je vidljiva.
example.gloss: The tension between them was visible.

example.target: Ostao je ravnodušan prema našoj molbi.
example.gloss: He remained indifferent to our request.
